title: helichrysum apiculatum var. minor
intro: Helichrysum apiculatum var. minor is a lesser-known variety of the Helichrysum apiculatum plant, commonly referred to as a type of Everlasting daisy. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Helichrysum apiculatum var. minor include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate pain, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is also used in aromatherapy due to its calming and relaxing properties.
